body:
5 token-efficiency tips for Cursor Composer 2

1/ Use .cursorignore to exclude node_modules and build dirs
2/ Reference files by @filename instead of pasting code
3/ Scope your prompt to ONE task per Composer session
4/ Use 'apply' not 'explain' for pure refactors
5/ Enable auto-context for monorepos

Save tokens, ship faster: https://cursor.so/?ref=printmaxx

#CursorTips #AIProductivity
